/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -mavx2 -mfma -msse2 -ftree-vectorize -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -fopenmp -fopenmp-simd -funroll-loops -Wfatal-errors -DUSE_AVX2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -g -DNDEBUG -Ofast -march=native -mtune=native -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compute_groundtruth.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/compute_groundtruth.dir/compute_groundtruth.cpp.o -o compute_groundtruth  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/UNG/codes/third_party/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.16.3/lib:/home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/knowhere/build/Release:/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 ../src/libANNS.a /home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/UNG/codes/third_party/CRoaring/build/src/libroaring.a /home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/UNG/codes/third_party/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.16.3/lib/libonnxruntime.so ../acorn_build/faiss/libfaiss.a /home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/NaviX/build/faiss_navix/libfaiss_avx2.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_intel_lp64.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_gnu_thread.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_core.so -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/knowhere/build/Release/libknowhere.so /usr/local/lib/liburing.so
